task_completion.description: Configure the SvalSat ground station with correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station configuration window, settings panel, or list showing the name 'SvalSat' with Latitude approximately 78.2298 N, Longitude 15.4078 E, and Altitude 450 meters.

task_completion.description: Create a tracking module named 'Dense_Constellation' and assign it to the SvalSat ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module, dashboard, or window titled 'Dense_Constellation' that explicitly displays 'SvalSat' as its active or assigned ground station.

task_completion.description: Assign the 7 specified satellites to the 'Dense_Constellation' tracking module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of tracked satellites within the 'Dense_Constellation' module's configuration or active view showing exactly these satellites (or their NORAD IDs): ISS (ZARYA) [25544], CSS (TIANHE) [48274], CSS (WENTIAN) [53239], SUOMI NPP [37849], FENGYUN 3A [32958], FENGYUN 3B [37214], and DMSP 5D-3 F18 [35951].

task_completion.description: Disable 'Coverage areas' and 'Ground tracks' in the module's map settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map settings/properties dialog for the 'Dense_Constellation' module showing the checkboxes for 'Coverage areas' and 'Ground tracks' as unchecked/disabled, OR a map view where only satellite markers are visible without any footprint circles or trailing track lines.

task_completion.description: Set the global geographic coordinate format to Degrees, Minutes, Seconds (DMS).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A global preferences or settings window showing the geographic coordinate format option explicitly set to 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds' or 'DMS'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's Graphical User Interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the application's menus, dialog boxes, and settings windows rather than just editing configuration files in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual satellite tracking software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes must be visible within the actual tracking application interface, not just typed out as text in a notepad or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by copying a pre-made configuration file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the step-by-step creation of the ground station, module, and settings adjustments in the UI, rather than a sudden appearance of the fully configured module via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: SvalSat Coordinates: Latitude 78.2298 N, Longitude 15.4078 E, Altitude 450m. Required Satellite NORAD IDs: 25544 (ISS ZARYA), 48274 (CSS TIANHE), 53239 (CSS WENTIAN), 37849 (SUOMI NPP), 32958 (FENGYUN 3A), 37214 (FENGYUN 3B), 35951 (DMSP 5D-3 F18).
